pet_notes: A small, plump water-spirit creature. Round teardrop body in soft sky blue with a paler belly, big glossy dark eyes with a tiny white highlight, two short stubby side-fins, a small smiling mouth, and a tiny water-droplet tuft on top of the head. The whole silhouette is one compact rounded droplet that fits inside a 192x208 cell. The character reads as cheerful, curious, and friendly. Use the canonical base for every animation row.
style_notes: Soft 3D-toy style: rounded volumes, gentle subsurface-like skin, large glossy eyes, slightly matte plastic/PVC feel, no outlines, no harsh lighting, no text or logos. Keep the whole body inside the cell with comfortable padding.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `3d-toy`: Stylized 3D toy mascot with smooth rounded forms, simple materials, clear silhouette, and no photoreal complexity. User style notes: Soft 3D-toy style: rounded volumes, gentle subsurface-like skin, large glossy eyes, slightly matte plastic/PVC feel, no outlines, no harsh lighting, no text or logos. Keep the whole body inside the cell with comfortable padding..
brand_brief: Roco Kingdom is a child-friendly Chinese monster-collecting game; Shuilanlan is its iconic blue water starter, small and rounded with a droplet silhouette and a playful, gentle personality.
pet_safe_style: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction.
